breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran slams 'barbaric' U.S. attack after hospital evacuated due to nearby strike
breaking.summary: Mediator Pakistan says encouraging U.S. and Iran to resume talks

breaking.title: New Zealand warns of tsunami threat after 5.9-magnitude quake
breaking.summary: People in affected areas should make their way to the “nearest high ground, out of tsunami evacuation zones, or as far inland as possible”, the National Emergency Management Agency said.

breaking.title: TMC MP Koel Mallick resigns from Rajya Sabha
breaking.summary: “I do hereby resign from the membership of Rajya Sabha, which may please be accepted with immediate effect,” Ms. Mallick said in her resignation letter.

breaking.title: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
breaking.summary: Explosions were heard across Iran overnight, shortly after neighbouring Gulf states began to report attacks.

breaking.title: Ukraine gets new PM: Parliament approves Serhii Koretskyi amid cabinet shuffle
breaking.summary: Ukraine's parliament approved Serhii Koretskyi as the new prime minister on Thursday. This appointment follows the resignation of former prime minister Yulia Svyrydenko. President Zelenskyy cited Koretskyi's energy sector experience for winter preparations. The government reshuffle includes other senior officials and aims to refresh leadership. Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal as defense minister sparked protests and criticism.

breaking.title: Korean subscriber attacks stock YouTuber after losing money on investment
breaking.summary: A South Korean man was arrested for allegedly attacking a stock YouTuber after reportedly suffering heavy investment losses from following the creator's recommendations. The incident has reignited concerns over the growing influence of online investment influencers and the risks of relying on unverified stock tips without independent research.

breaking.title: What is Greater Tunb Island, the strategic point in the Strait of Hormuz targeted by U.S. airstrikes?
breaking.summary: Greater Tunb is a small island in the Persian Gulf near the entrance to the Strait of Hormuz and is regarded as a strategically important location in the strait

breaking.title: PM Modi to flag off India’s first hydrogen-powered train in Haryana
breaking.summary: Unlike traditional trains, it generates its own electricity onboard through a chemical reaction between hydrogen and atmospheric oxygen, leaving behind water vapour; Mr. Modi will also inaugurate or lay the foundation for infrastructure worth over ₹25,000 crore during the day-long visit to Haryana and Punjab tomorrow
